---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, extension point, or change to existing behaviour
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

### Use case

Describe the concrete problem you are trying to solve. "I want X" is less
useful than "I am building Y, and the current API forces me to Z." Feature
requests without a concrete use case are likely to be closed — see the
scope section in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Proposed solution

What you would like to see. If the change touches `governance/`, sketch the
interface signature. If it adds a new transport adapter, sketch the package
layout.

### Alternatives considered

What you already tried, considered, or rejected. Did a custom `Interceptor`
get close? Did you try a different transport?

### Out-of-scope check

Does this request belong in GIL, or in the commercial Fulcrum platform?
See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#scope-what-belongs-here-vs-elsewhere).
If you think it belongs here but overlaps the commercial scope, explain why.
